notes: pre-clean removed 0 managed marker records from sandbox scope
Self-fix during V9a live proof: CommanderCliProvider._manifest_name was a bound method and made sharing marker JSON non-serializable; provider now stores _manifest_name as a value.

Self-fix during V9a live proof: Commander share-folder argv requires options before trailing folder positional; sharing helpers now put the shared-folder UID last and use -f for non-interactive grants/removes.
Self-fix during V9a cleanup: stale ACL sidecar deletion now tolerates Commander missing-folder errors after the parent shared folder is already gone.
V9a folder lifecycle landed; awaiting V9b record share lifecycle for status flip.
